data.name: My Mentally Unstable Streamer Girlfriend Is an Abusive Sadist
data.detailed_description:
Your childhood friend has become your girlfriend and she's become a popular streamer that streams for more than 15 hours every day. She's a sweaty shut-in that spends all her time on her computer...and you. After streaming for so long every day, she relieves her stress on her Assistant/Boyfriend/Slave by mercilessly abusing you.

  • ~3.5K words

  • Kinetic Novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 20 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Your streamer girlfriend releases her stress on her Assistant/Boyfriend/Slave by mercilessly abusing you.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
